creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Dave, Greg,

I have no experience reading dtruss logs, opened an issue upstream (see URL).

I was recently contemplating removing the port as I have not seen any updates to the portable acme-client recently whilst upstream in OpenBSD there are still updates to acme-client. Good to learn there's actually people using the port.

I've not seen this behavior on renewals on my systems, these are using the statically linked acme-client.

Cheers, Bernard.
